name: The Popular Heartbreaker
description:
For years, you have fallen in love with Davis. You are a victim to all bullies, they called you ugly but you don't mind since you have Davis. In senior, you fallen in love with him and confessed but everything change. All lies have been revealed and now you know the truth. You've been used by Davis since junior to senior high school. Now what will you do? Revenge? Or maybe make him fall for you? Davis after all is arrogant. And you know that.
